history.qwen_observation: Compilation fails on JDK 11 with NoClassDefFoundError for javax.xml.bind.JAXBException, indicating missing JAXB modules required by annotation processors during the JDK 11 transition.
history.qwen_rationale: Per the compatibility matrix, upgrading Spring Boot to 2.7 under JDK 8 first is the safest path. This updates dependency management to versions that properly provide JAXB and are compatible with JDK 11+. We then proceed to JDK 11 using UpgradeToJava11, removing manual JAXB injections that may conflict with Spring Boot's BOM, and upgrading the compiler plugin to 3.11.0 to ensure robust annotation processor support.
